title: croton pampangensis
intro: Croton pampangensis, also known as Pampanga croton or Philippine croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton pampangensis include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by infusing its leaves in hot water to make a herbal tea, or by using its roots to make a decoction, which is then used to treat various ailments.
